# Upstream Reference

- Source repository: `https://github.com/MoonshotAI/K2-Vendor-Verifier`
- Snapshot purpose: keep the upstream evaluator shape available under `third_party/` for reference and diffing.
- Snapshot contents in this directory are not the repo's primary execution path.
- The local runner used by this repository lives at `k2_verifier/cli.py` and `k2_verifier/core.py`.
- Snapshot refreshed on: `2026-03-18`
